/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/SlotGameQt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/frontend/src/ActivePredictionsDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/frontend/src/LeaderboardWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/frontend/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/frontend/src/PredictionDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/frontend/src/ProfileDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/frontend/src/QuizWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/frontend/src/ResultDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/frontend/src/StartWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/frontend/src/StrategyDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/backend/src/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/backend/src/leaderboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/backend/src/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/backend/src/predictionevaluator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/backend/src/predictionmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/backend/src/probability.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/backend/src/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/backend/src/slot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SlotGameQt.dir/backend/src/strategy.cpp.o -o SlotGameQt -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
